info.title: Portfolio API
info.description: Enterprise portfolio platform — fully separated Portfolio (public) and Admin (authenticated) APIs. The global prefix is `/api`. Public endpoints are read-only (except lead submission and analytics tracking). Admin endpoints require JWT Bearer authentication and role-based access control (`admin`, `editor`, `viewer`).
